_doc: senses_attested exclusion / takedown record. A row is DROPPED from the published parquet (and its content_sha256) if it matches ANY rule below; a rule matches when ALL of its stated fields equal the row's. Fields: lexeme, stem, sense, surface (compared lowercase), base_text. Omit a field to wildcard it. Read automatically by `python -m lexeme_aligner.senses_attested` (default --exclude data/senses_exclude.json). Removed rows are dropped and survivor shares renormalise — never re-emitted with provenance stripped. This file is committed so the removal history is auditable.
